plugins.name: lego-plan-builder
plugins.description: Generate official-manual-style LEGO build instructions from an idea or image — Claude composes a stud-grid model, a deterministic pipeline validates physics/legality, sequences kid-appropriate steps, renders via LDraw/LeoCAD, and assembles a printable booklet whose bill of materials carries real LEGO element IDs with Pick a Brick ordering links. Includes lego-mosaic: deterministic photo → stud-grid wall art.

plugins.name: speculator
plugins.description: Speculator — spec quality scoring and a 7-gate pipeline (4 required + 3 opt-in: eval intent, eval quality, comprehension — each bindable to spec risk levels) with LLM-as-judge evaluation, git worktree isolation, and beads issue tracking. Includes asbuilt-quiz: a human-facing comprehension quiz generator built on the As-Built knowledge system. Quality In, Quality Out.

plugins.name: fable-mode
plugins.description: Fable 5's working discipline as a skill — a five-gate task loop (scope, evidence, adversarial reasoning, verification, calibrated reporting) for complex, multi-step, or uncertain work.

plugins.name: fable-conductor
plugins.description: Fable-maximised orchestration of entire work streams — Fable owns brainstorm/spec/plan, escalations, and final review; autonomous opus/sonnet/haiku adversarial workflows (implement, review, test) execute everything mechanical in between, coordinated through durable file contracts.
